name: Dav-El Los Angeles Inc
owner_or_parent: Marcou Transportation Group (Dav El | BostonCoach / Harrison Global)
recent_news: Dav El merged with BostonCoach in 2013 under Marcou Transportation Group; parent has rolled up Metropolitan Limousine (Chicago, 2016), Worldwide Transportation (Miami, 2016), GroundLink and Limo Anywhere (2017). Yelp page for Hawthorne location indicates business is closed.
fit_notes: LA branch of national Dav El/BostonCoach chauffeured network owned by Marcou Transportation Group; premium corporate/airport limo business, not a school-bus contractor. Already a strategic/PE-backed roll-up; not an independent tuck-in target for Summit.
